headline: Is LyondellBasell (LYB) the Best European Stock That Beat Earnings Estimates to Buy?
summary: LyondellBasell Industries N.V. (NYSE:LYB) is one of the 10 Best European Stocks That Beat Earnings Estimates to Buy. On May 1, 2026, LyondellBasell Industries N.V. (NYSE:LYB) reported Q1 adjusted EPS of 49c versus 28c consensus and revenue of $7.2B compared to $7.37B expected. CEO Peter Vanacker said results reflect “operational discipline and commercial execution,” while […]
